name: methylong
description: Nextflow workflow for DNA methylation analysis from long reads (ONT/PacBio). Extract methylation calls, perform variant calling, phasing, and DMR analysis.
usage: methylong [--input samplesheet.csv] [--outdir results] [-profile docker] [--pacbio_modcall] [--dorado_modification VAR...] [--fiberseq] [--dmr_population_scale] [--dmr_a VAR] [--dmr_b VAR] [--dmr_caller VAR] [--aligner VAR] [--pacbio_pileup VAR] [--skip_fastqc] [--skip_trimming]

kwargs.profile: Execution profile (REQUIRED): docker, singularity, conda, podman, shifter, charliecloud, apptainer, wave, gpu, test
kwargs.pacbio_modcall: Enable PacBio modification calling from unmodified BAM [boolean]
kwargs.dmr_a: Sample group name 1 for DMR comparison. Required with --dmr_population_scale
kwargs.dmr_b: Sample group name 2 for DMR comparison. Required with --dmr_population_scale
kwargs.dmr_caller: DMR caller method: dss or modkit [default: dss]
kwargs.aligner: Alignment tool: minimap2 or pbmm2 [default: minimap2]
kwargs.pacbio_pileup: PacBio pileup tool: modkit or pb-CpG-tools [default: modkit]
kwargs.skip_trimming: Skip read trimming for ONT data [boolean]
